generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for collecting point cloud data in vehicle's proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for collecting depth data in vehicle's proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDepthCameraData
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudDataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance IntelDepthCameraDataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance TranslatedHokuyoPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Translated point cloud data after serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler, SQLDatabase
]

instance TranslatedIntelDepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Translated depth data after serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler, SQLDatabase
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation component for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering and Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing FE for clustering and tracking algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, SpeedComputationAction, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enabling/disabling of ACC, setting desired speeds, issuing emergency braking commands, and data collection for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteEnableDisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, DataCollectionForTroubleshootingAction
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving data to SQL database for storage"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detecting lead vehicles for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computing speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating actuation commands for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteEnableDisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remotely enabling or disabling ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issuing emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataCollectionForTroubleshootingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Collecting data for developer troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity for the 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity for the ADAS system"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for operators and developers"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower level chassis controlling steering and speed"
]

instance ADASEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, ThreeDVisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE, VedderElectronicSpeedController, LowerLevelChassis, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for motor actuation and steering servo operations are generated by the ACC Controlling FE, serialized by the Data Translation component, and transmitted via ROS2 network to the Actuation FE. Specific details on command validation, authentication, feedback mechanisms, and execution confirmation are not provided in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Synchronization accuracy of 100 ms is required for coordination between devices and computation offloading due to hardware limitations, whereas safety-critical vehicular standards mandate stricter synchronization (i.e., <100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system's orchestration follows ISO 23247 RA, organizing components into Physical Twin Entity (handling resource-specific and general automotive functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and User Entity (3D Visualization and Control Panel). Each entity is deployed on dedicated hardware, with FEs implemented as ROS2 packages. The Physical Twin Entity's design diverges from ISO 23247 by encompassing inherent system resources rather than only resource-specific functionality, affecting functionality ownership and engineering processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs over a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer protocol. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency constraints, reliability mechanisms, redundancy configurations, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, Part 2 (Reference Architecture), defining an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) implement specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing, with implementation examples including OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection and device control."
]
